Reason Over Retrieved Capsules

Source: R/reason.R
ks_reason.Rd

Retrieves top capsules for a query and asks a reasoning model using only those capsule summaries. Optionally expands context with child capsules.

Usage

ks_reason(
  store,
  query,
  n = 5L,
  expand = FALSE,
  model,
  provider = ks_get_option("provider"),
  base_url = NULL,
  echo = "none",
  ...
)

Arguments

store

A ks_capsule_store.

query

User question.

n

Number of top capsules to retrieve.

expand

Logical. If TRUE, include child capsules of top results.

model

Reasoning model name.

provider

Provider (ollama/lm_studio/openai/anthropic).

base_url

Optional provider URL override.

echo

Echo mode forwarded to ellmer.

...

Extra args forwarded to chat constructor.

Value

A ks_result.
